mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MENTORING (INTERNAL_ID, MENTOR_NUMBER, SUBJECT_NUMBER, MENTORING_TITLE, MENTORING_GOAL, MENTORING_DETAIL, FILE_NUMBER, CREATE_AT, UPDATE_AT) VALUES (SEQ_MENTORING.NEXTVAL, #{mentorNumber}, #{subjectNumber}, #{mentoringTitle}, #{mentoringGoal}, #{mentoringDetail}, #{fileNumber}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT INTERNAL_ID as interanlId, MENTOR_NUMBER as mentorNumber, SUBJECT_NUMBER as subjectNumber, MENTORING_TITLE as mentoringTitle, MENTORING_GOAL as mentoringGoal, MENTORING_DETAIL as mentoringDetail, FILE_NUMBER as fileNumber, CREATE_AT as createAt, UPDATE_AT as updateAt FROM TBL_MENTORING WHERE INTERNAL_ID = #{interanlId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MENTORING SET SUBJECT_NUMBER = #{subjectNumber}, MENTORING_TITLE = #{mentoringTitle}, MENTORING_GOAL = #{mentoringGoal}, MENTORING_DETAIL = #{mentoringDetail}, FILE_NUMBER = #{fileNumber}, UPDATE_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE INTERNAL_ID = #{interanlId}
